testcase.name: CreateRafflePage > renders create raffle form

testcase.name: CreateRafflePage > shows processing state during raffle creation
testcase.system-out: 🔍 [CreateRafflePage] NFTs from hook: { count: [33m0[39m, loading: [33mfalse[39m, nfts: [], hasDuplicates: [33mfalse[39m }

testcase.name: CreateRafflePage > calls createRaffle when form is submitted with valid data
WalletConnection > shows connect button when wallet is not connected
WalletConnection > shows connect button when wallet is connecting
WalletConnection > shows wallet address when connected
WalletConnection > opens Web3Modal when connect button is clicked
testcase.system-out:
🔍 [DEBUG] Connect button clicked 🔍 [DEBUG] Environment: development 🔍 [DEBUG] Env Chain ID: [33m33139[39m 🔍 [DEBUG] Actual Chain ID (wagmi): [33m33139[39m 🔍 [DEBUG] User Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (darwin) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) jsdom/27.4.0 🔍 [DEBUG] Window.ethereum: [33mtrue[39m 🔍 [DEBUG] Is Mobile: [33mfalse[39m 🔍 [DEBUG] Opening Web3Modal...
🔍 [DEBUG] Web3Modal opened successfully

testcase.name: WalletConnection > calls disconnect when disconnect button is clicked
Raffle Contract Utilities > validates raffle parameters correctly
Raffle Contract Utilities > calculates transaction timeouts correctly
Raffle Contract Utilities > formats contract errors properly
Raffle Contract Utilities > validates approval status correctly
useRaffleContractV4 hooks > useContractVersionManager > returns version information
useRaffleContractV4 hooks > usePlatformFeeV4 > reads platform fee
useRaffleContractV4 hooks > useCreateRaffleV4 > initializes with correct default state
useRaffleContractV4 hooks > useCreateRaffleV4 > handles createRaffle function call
testcase.system-out: 🎯 [CREATE] Creating raffle - NFT will be transferred from user wallet to raffle contract 📝 [CREATE] NFT: 0x1234567890123456789012345678901234567890 Token ID: 123

testcase.name: useRaffleContractV4 hooks > useNFTApprovalV4 > handles approveNFT function call
useRaffleContractV4 hooks > useNFTApprovalV4 > shows processing state during transaction
inputSanitizer > sanitizeInput > removes script tags
inputSanitizer > sanitizeInput > removes javascript: protocols
inputSanitizer > sanitizeInput > removes on* event handlers
inputSanitizer > sanitizeInput > preserves safe content
inputSanitizer > sanitizeInput > handles empty and null inputs
inputSanitizer > sanitizeInput > trims whitespace
inputSanitizer > validateAddress > validates correct Ethereum addresses
inputSanitizer > validateAddress > rejects invalid address formats
inputSanitizer > validateAddress > rejects addresses with invalid characters
inputSanitizer > validateAddress > handles mixed case addresses
inputSanitizer > validatePositiveNumber > validates positive numbers
inputSanitizer > validatePositiveNumber > rejects zero and negative numbers
inputSanitizer > validatePositiveNumber > rejects invalid number formats
inputSanitizer > validatePositiveNumber > handles edge cases
inputSanitizer > validatePositiveNumber > validates within reasonable ranges
